CustomField.description: Uniqueness guard for open alerts: Account Id + SHA-256 of the normalized pattern text, set by NeuraFormAnomalyEscalation. The unique index closes the check-then-insert race between concurrent queueables (two findings landing at once can both pass the open-alert query). When an alert closes (Sent/Dismissed), AnomalyAlertTrigger suffixes this with the record Id to free the slot so the same pattern can re-alert later.
CustomField.label: Dedupe Key
